channel.title: debian on Colin Murphy's site
channel.description: Recent content in debian on Colin Murphy's site

item.title: Debian Installation Guide
item.description: This is a quick guide on the process I go through after installing Debian. These steps have been tested on Debian 12 (bookworm), but are likely to work on other releases of Debian. Log in as your normal (non-root) user. Update the repos, install updates, and install some common utilities: su - # enter root password apt update apt -y dist-upgrade apt -y install sudo htop nano vim tmux dtach firewalld fail2ban rsync curl git Copy SSH key as your normal user.
